query:
SELECT
            sst.type_cd,
            s.line_cd,
            sst.station_cd,
            sst.line_group_cd,
            sst.pass,
            t.id,
            t.type_name,
            t.type_name_k,
            t.type_name_r,
            t.type_name_zh,
            t.type_name_ko,
            t.color,
            t.kind AS "kind?",
            t.direction AS "direction?"
            FROM types as t
            JOIN station_station_types AS sst ON sst.line_group_cd = $1
            JOIN stations AS s ON s.station_cd = sst.station_cd
            WHERE 
            sst.station_cd IN (
                SELECT 
                station_cd 
                FROM 
                stations as s 
                WHERE 
                line_cd = $2
                AND s.e_status = 0
            )
            AND t.type_cd = sst.type_cd
            ORDER BY t.kind, sst.id
